changelog.title: Current Release Notes | Adobe Marketo Engage
changelog.text:
Current Release Notes | Adobe Marketo Engage
Documentation
Marketo Engage
Marketo Guide
Release Notes: March 2026
Last update:
April 9, 2026
Bookmark
Sign-in to bookmark
Copy link
Copy link URL
Topics:
Release Information
Below you’ll find all the features included in the March '26 release. Check your Adobe Marketo Engage edition for feature availability.
The Release Notes specifically for Adobe Dynamic Chat
can be found here
.
Standard Release Cycle Features
The following features fall under the standard release cycle and will start to be released on
March 27, 2026
, with a phased rollout of remaining features over the subsequent weeks. Release features and dates are subject to change. Please check next to each feature for its status.
Feature
Status
Documentation
Email Designer - Manage Brands (beta)
: Generate email content based on your organization/brand's specific copywriting guidelines.
Released
Create and manage brands
Email Designer - Quick Actions
:
Parity with the old email editor
. Quick actions are now available for all Email Designer assets (emails, email templates, fragments). Supported quick actions include: Duplicate, Delete, Move, Create/Edit Draft.
Released
n/a
Email Designer - Outlook Rendering Fix
: This update fixes rendering issues, especially in MS Outlook. Advanced HTML Mode allows you to make minor HTML/CSS edits or add script tags to your email template.
Released
Edit email templates with the advanced HTML editor
Email Designer - Brand Quality Checker
: Assess general content quality to identify potential issues with readability, content cohesiveness, and effectiveness, independent of your brand guidelines.
Coming Soon
Coming Soon
Picklist Management
: You can now specify the values that can be used in fields in Marketo Engage.
Coming Soon
Coming Soon
Push Notifications
: Redirect URLs configured in Push notification messages now support Marketo Engage tokens (applicable to
Launch App URLs
only).
Coming Soon
Coming Soon
Announcements
SEO Feature Deprecation
: On Tuesday, March 31, 2026, Marketo Engage will deprecate the Search Engine Optimization feature (SEO). If you don’t actively use SEO, you don’t have to do anything. If you have used SEO recently, you have the option of exporting your data.
Learn more
.
REST API Merge Leads limit
: Beginning March 31, 2026, calls that include more than 25 IDs in the leadIds parameter of a Merge Leads API call will result in a 1080 error code, and the call will be skipped. Jobs requiring the merger of more than 25 records into one should be split into multiple jobs to ensure the success of those calls.
Rest API ‘access_token’ Parameter Deprecation
: The
access_token
query parameter used to authenticate Marketo REST API calls is being deprecated and will not be available after July 31, 2026. All new and existing integrations should authenticate REST API calls using the ‘Authorization’ header,
as described here
.
SOAP API Deprecation
: Support for the Marketo SOAP API will end on July 31, 2026. Services which use SOAP API capabilities should be migrated to the
REST API
.
Previous page
Release Schedule
Next page
Dynamic Chat Release

docs.title: Marketo Product Docs | Adobe Marketo Engage
docs.text:
Marketo Product Docs | Adobe Marketo Engage
Documentation
Marketo Engage
Marketo Guide
Marketo Engage Product Docs
Last update:
April 29, 2026
Bookmark
Sign-in to bookmark
Copy link
Copy link URL
Modern demand marketing strategies require end-to-end engagement to deliver the best possible customer experiences. Learn how to achieve this with Marketo Engage—part of Adobe Experience Cloud—by viewing our range of docs, guides, and tutorials.
Whether you are just getting started and want an introductory Marketo Engage tutorial, or you are an experienced user looking to get more out of your subscription, you’ll find all the answers you need in the Marketo Engage Product Docs.

hits.title: Social is dead; only media left

analysis.name: Adobe Marketo Engage
analysis.tagline: Modern demand marketing strategies require end-to-end engagement to deliver the best possible customer experiences.
analysis.value_proposition: Enterprise marketing automation platform for demand generation, lead management, multi-channel engagement, and revenue attribution as part of Adobe Experience Cloud.
analysis.ideal_customer: B2B enterprise marketing teams running complex demand generation, lead nurturing, and multi-touch revenue attribution programs at scale

features.name: email designer
features.description: Visual drag-and-drop email builder with templates, fragments, and advanced HTML mode
features.evidence_quote: Email Designer Overview

features.name: email designer - brand management
features.description: Generate email content based on organization/brand-specific copywriting guidelines (beta)
features.evidence_quote: Generate email content based on your organization/brand's specific copywriting guidelines.

features.name: email designer - brand quality checker
features.description: Assess content quality for readability, cohesiveness, and effectiveness independent of brand guidelines
features.evidence_quote: Assess general content quality to identify potential issues with readability, content cohesiveness, and effectiveness

features.description: Make minor HTML/CSS edits or add script tags to email templates; resolves MS Outlook rendering issues
features.evidence_quote: Advanced HTML Mode allows you to make minor HTML/CSS edits or add script tags to your email template.

features.name: email designer - quick actions
features.description: Duplicate, delete, move, and create/edit drafts for email assets, templates, and fragments
features.evidence_quote: Quick actions are now available for all Email Designer assets (emails, email templates, fragments).

differentiators: Part of Adobe Experience Cloud — native integration with Analytics, Target, AEP, GenStudio, AJO, Advertising Cloud
End-to-end demand marketing from awareness through revenue attribution in a single platform
Marketo AI agents for program QA, lead import, and AI-assisted content generation
Dynamic Chat for AI-powered conversational marketing on web properties
LaunchPoint partner ecosystem with certified third-party integrations via Adobe Exchange
Enterprise workspaces for multi-brand and multi-team data isolation within a single instance
Deep bidirectional CRM sync natively with both Salesforce and Microsoft Dynamics

recent_ships.what: Email Designer - Manage Brands (beta): generate email content from org/brand copywriting guidelines
recent_ships.source: Generate email content based on your organization/brand's specific copywriting guidelines. Released.

recent_ships.what: Email Designer - Quick Actions: duplicate, delete, move, create/edit draft for all email assets
recent_ships.source: Quick actions are now available for all Email Designer assets (emails, email templates, fragments). Released.

recent_ships.what: Email Designer - Outlook Rendering Fix with Advanced HTML Mode for minor HTML/CSS edits
recent_ships.source: Advanced HTML Mode allows you to make minor HTML/CSS edits or add script tags to your email template. Released.

recent_ships.what: Email Designer - Brand Quality Checker for readability, cohesiveness, effectiveness assessment (coming soon)
recent_ships.source: Assess general content quality to identify potential issues with readability, content cohesiveness, and effectiveness

recent_ships.what: Picklist Management: specify and enforce allowed values for Marketo Engage fields (coming soon)
recent_ships.source: You can now specify the values that can be used in fields in Marketo Engage.

recent_ships.what: Push Notifications: Marketo token support in Launch App redirect URLs (coming soon)
recent_ships.source: Redirect URLs configured in Push notification messages now support Marketo Engage tokens (applicable to Launch App URLs only).

recent_ships.what: SEO feature deprecated March 31, 2026 with data export option for existing users
recent_ships.source: On Tuesday, March 31, 2026, Marketo Engage will deprecate the Search Engine Optimization feature (SEO).

recent_ships.what: SOAP API end-of-life July 31, 2026 — all integrations to migrate to REST API
recent_ships.source: Support for the Marketo SOAP API will end on July 31, 2026. Services which use SOAP API capabilities should be migrated to the REST API.

recent_ships.what: REST API access_token query parameter deprecated July 31, 2026 — migrate to Authorization header
recent_ships.source: The access_token query parameter used to authenticate Marketo REST API calls is being deprecated and will not be available after July 31, 2026.

pricing.notes: No pricing page was available in the provided sources. Adobe Marketo Engage is enterprise contact-sales only with no public tier pricing. Historically priced by database size (number of marketable contacts), not per-seat. Growth, Select, Prime, and Ultimate packages have been marketed in the past but prices are not publicly listed.
